productDisplayName: Puma Men Heroes Navy Blue Jackets
description: CompositionNavy blue track jacket with the shell made of 100% polyester, ribbing made of 97% polyester and 3% elastane, has a mock neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and has a white panel, full front zipper, zippered pockets on the sides, ribbed hem and branding in print on the left chestFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironDo not dry cleanDesigned to offer exemplary snug comfort during your training sessions, this track jacket from puma oozes sporty attitude. Team it with track pants or layer it over jeans and t-shirts.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
